creator: wen@FreeBSD.org
text:
Update biology/py-biopython to 1.66

Index: Makefile
===================================================================
--- Makefile    (revision 413348)
+++ Makefile    (working copy)
@@ -2,8 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$

 PORTNAME=      biopython
-PORTVERSION=   1.65
-PORTREVISION=  0
+PORTVERSION=   1.66
 CATEGORIES=    biology python
 MASTER_SITES=  http://www.biopython.org/DIST/
 PKGNAMEPREFIX= ${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
Index: distinfo
===================================================================
--- distinfo    (revision 413348)
+++ distinfo    (working copy)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (biopython-1.65.tar.gz) = 463cc81db84e9bfcdfb15629511c81ed556a6c0287e670dbfe80f03c65d2a88e
-SIZE (biopython-1.65.tar.gz) = 12641342
+SHA256 (biopython-1.66.tar.gz) = 5178ea3b343b1d8710f39205386093e5369ed653aa020e1b0c4b7622a59346c1
+SIZE (biopython-1.66.tar.gz) = 13724754
